message: Switch renderer to swift-markdown for GFM support

files.patch:
@@ -114,6 +114,44 @@ final class RenderedHTMLBuilderTests: XCTestCase { XCTAssertFalse(html.contains("language-mermaid")) } + func testRendersGFMTableSyntax() { + let body = """ + | Name | Value | + | --- | --- | + | Alpha | 1 | + """ + let document = ParsedMarkdownDocument(body: body, flattenedFrontmatter: [:]) + + let html = RenderedHTMLBuilder().build(document: document) + + XCTAssertTrue(html.contains("")) + XCTAssertTrue(html.contains("")) + XCTAssertTrue(html.contains("")) + } + + func testRendersGFMTaskListItems() { + let body = """ + - [x] Done + - [ ] Pending + """ + let document = ParsedMarkdownDocument(body: body, flattenedFrontmatter: [:]) + + let html = RenderedHTMLBuilder().build(document: document) + + XCTAssertTrue(html.contains("type=\"checkbox\"")) + XCTAssertTrue(html.contains("checked=\"\"")) + XCTAssertTrue(html.contains("Pending")) + } + + func testRendersGFMStrikethrough() { + let body = "This is ~~struck~~ text." + let document = ParsedMarkdownDocument(body: body, flattenedFrontmatter: [:]) + + let html = RenderedHTMLBuilder().build(document: document) + + XCTAssertTrue(html.contains("struck")) + } + func testTransformsLatexFencedBlocksIntoMathContainers() { let body = """ ```latex
NameAlpha

@@ -7,9 +7,9 @@ packages:
   Yams:
     url: https://github.com/jpsim/Yams
     from: 5.1.0
-  Down:
-    url: https://github.com/johnxnguyen/Down
-    from: 0.11.0
+  Markdown:
+    url: https://github.com/swiftlang/swift-markdown
+    from: 0.7.3
   Sparkle:
     url: https://github.com/sparkle-project/Sparkle
     from: 2.9.0
@@ -32,7 +32,7 @@ targets:
         SPARKLE_PUBLIC_ED_KEY: ""
     dependencies:
       - package: Yams
-      - package: Down
+      - package: Markdown
       - package: Sparkle
   ClearanceTests:
     type: bundle.unit-test
